title: Horse Highway
description:
An interesting new way for players to travel, using horses!

Each block the player travels on using their horse can have a different speed, allowing for you to have different road materials for different speeds.
body:
An interesting new way for players to travel, using horses!
Each block the player travels on using their horse can have a different speed, allowing for you to have different road materials for different speeds.

Included example: black concrete allows you to travel at 100 km/h, and yellow concrete limits you to 20 km/h. Place down these blocks in-game and get on a horse to try it out!

Edit the speed of each block in speed_on_blocks.yml or the "/horsehighway" command, and set the default speed in config.yml.

Run "/horsehighway help" in-game for help.
